title: SchemaRecord
description: A single field definition extracted from a vendor or unified-API schema

system.description: Source system identifier, e.g. ashby, greenhouse, lever, unified-api

model.description: Model name within the system, e.g. jobs, candidates, employees

field.description: Field name as exposed by the source system

field_type.description: Field type, e.g. string, integer, boolean, array<string>, object

unified_key.description: The unified/canonical key this field maps to

required.description: Whether this field is required by the source system

notes.description: Human-readable notes about mapping semantics or edge cases

aliases.description: Alternative remote field names that map to the same unified key

source_url.description: Reference URL or vendor-docs identifier for provenance
